# @alternative-design-and-media/quick-api-connector (llms-full)

Machine-readable reference for AI assistants.

## Package

- Name: `@alternative-design-and-media/quick-api-connector`
- Runtime: native `fetch` (Node.js 18+ and edge runtimes)
- OpenAPI source: `api.json`

## Main exports

- `createQuickClient(config: QuickClientConfig): QuickClient`
- `createQuickApiClient(config: QuickClientConfig): QuickClient`
- `QuickClient`
- `QuickApiError`
- Shared domain types from `src/types/index.ts`

## QuickClientConfig

```ts
type QuickClientConfig =
  | { apiToken: string; companyId?: string; baseUrl?: string; fetchFn?: typeof fetch }
  | { bearerToken: string; companyId: string; baseUrl?: string; fetchFn?: typeof fetch };
```

## Exported object-oriented API signatures

```ts
client.expenses.listV1(params?: ListExpensesV1Params)
client.expenses.listV2(params?: ListExpensesV2Params)
client.expenses.getV1(expenseId: number, fields?: ExpenseV1Fields[])
client.expenses.getV2(expenseId: number, fields?: ExpenseV2Fields[])
client.expenses.updateV2(expenseId: number, body: UpdateExpenseV2Body)
client.expenses.searchArtifact(body: SearchExpenseArtifactBody)
client.expenses.create(body: CreateExpensesBody)
client.expenses.bulkAcceptQuarantine(ids: number[])
client.expenses.bulkApprove(ids: number[])
client.expenses.bulkUnapprove(ids: number[])
client.expenses.bulkCheck(ids: number[])
client.expenses.bulkUncheck(ids: number[])
client.expenses.bulkExport(ids: number[])

client.incomes.list(params?: ListIncomesParams)
client.incomes.get(incomeId: number, fields?: IncomeFields[])

client.artifacts.getExpense(ids: number[])
client.artifacts.getIncome(ids: number[])

client.documents.list(params?: ListDocumentsParams)
client.documents.listFiles(params?: ListDocumentFilesParams)
client.documents.listTypes()
client.documents.get(documentId: number)
client.documents.update(documentId: number, body: BodyFor<'/2/documents/update/{document_id}', 'post'>)
client.documents.create(body: BodyFor<'/2/documents/create', 'post'>)
client.documents.delete(body: BodyFor<'/2/documents/delete', 'post'>)
client.documents.attach(body: BodyFor<'/1/documents/attach', 'post'>)
client.documents.detach(body: BodyFor<'/1/documents/detach', 'post'>)
client.documents.search(body: BodyFor<'/2/documents/search', 'post'>)

client.accounting.ledgerNumbers.list()
client.accounting.ledgerNumbers.create(body: BodyFor<'/2/accounting/ledger-numbers/create', 'post'>)
client.accounting.ledgerNumbers.update(id: number, body: BodyFor<'/2/accounting/ledger-numbers/update/{ledger_number_id}', 'post'>)
client.accounting.ledgerNumbers.delete(ids: number[])
client.accounting.vatCategories.list()
client.accounting.vatCategories.create(body: BodyFor<'/2/accounting/vat-categories/create', 'post'>)
client.accounting.vatCategories.update(id: number, body: BodyFor<'/2/accounting/vat-categories/update/{company_vat_category_id}', 'post'>)
client.accounting.vatCategories.delete(ids: number[])

client.companies.list()
client.companies.getUserProfile()

client.taxes.listCodes(params?: QueryFor<'/1/tax-codes', 'get'>)
client.taxes.listMonthlyV1(params?: QueryFor<'/1/monthly-taxes', 'get'>)
client.taxes.listMonthlyV2(params?: QueryFor<'/2/monthly-taxes', 'get'>)
client.taxes.createV1(body: BodyFor<'/1/taxes/create', 'post'>)
client.taxes.createV2(body: BodyFor<'/2/taxes/create', 'post'>)
client.taxes.updateV1(body: BodyFor<'/1/taxes/update', 'post'>)
client.taxes.updateV2(body: BodyFor<'/2/taxes/update', 'post'>)
client.taxes.deleteV1(ids: number[])
client.taxes.deleteV2(ids: number[])

client.salaries.listMonthlyV1(params?: QueryFor<'/1/monthly-salaries', 'get'>)
client.salaries.listMonthlyV2(params?: QueryFor<'/2/monthly-salaries', 'get'>)
client.salaries.createV1(body: BodyFor<'/1/salaries/create', 'post'>)
client.salaries.createV2(body: BodyFor<'/2/salaries/create', 'post'>)
client.salaries.updateV1(body: BodyFor<'/1/salaries/update', 'post'>)
client.salaries.updateV2(body: BodyFor<'/2/salaries/update', 'post'>)
client.salaries.deleteV1(ids: number[])
client.salaries.deleteV2(ids: number[])

client.tags.list(params?: QueryFor<'/2/tags', 'get'>)
client.tags.create(body: BodyFor<'/2/tags/create', 'post'>)
client.tags.update(body: BodyFor<'/2/tags/update', 'patch'>)
client.tags.delete(ids: number[])

client.misc.partners(params?: QueryFor<'/1/partners', 'get'>)
client.misc.accounts(params?: QueryFor<'/1/accounts', 'get'>)
client.misc.payments(params?: QueryFor<'/1/payments', 'get'>)
client.misc.pulse(params?: QueryFor<'/1/pulse', 'get'>)
client.misc.uploadAuditXml(body: BodyFor<'/2/audit-xml', 'post'>)
client.misc.companyInfo.get(params?: QueryFor<'/2/company-info', 'get'>)
client.misc.companyInfo.update(companyId: number, body: BodyFor<'/2/company-info/update/{company_id}', 'patch'>)
```

## Notes

- API token mode sends `Authorization: Token <apiToken>`
- OAuth mode sends `Authorization: Bearer <bearerToken>` and enforces `companyId`
- OAuth-only methods: `client.companies.list`, `client.companies.getUserProfile`
- Errors throw `QuickApiError` with `status` and parsed `body`
